security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: A secure password manager desktop client
bundle.longDescription: pass-tauri is a Tauri-based desktop client for pass-compatible password stores. It provides a secure, native interface for managing encrypted credentials with backend-only secret handling — passwords and OTP URIs never leave the Rust process until explicitly requested.
